name: 地城復古道具
description: 深色石材、鐵器、火光與復古 RPG 地城素材。

prompt.subject_template: A single standalone game item sprite of {{subject}}.
prompt.base: Centered isolated object, full object visible, readable silhouette, chunky 16-bit pixel art, crisp dark outline, hard pixel-art edges, strict 8-color low-color pixel art.
prompt.style: Retro dungeon RPG asset, sturdy stone, worn iron, aged leather, bone, ember, rune, or treasure materials only when they are part of the requested object.
prompt.composition: Compact game icon composition, the requested object is the only focal element, no floating detached loot, rubble, sparks, or background props outside the main silhouette.
prompt.containment: The entire subject must fit fully inside the canvas, leave solid magenta margin on all four sides, no ember, smoke, chain, blade tip, bone, rune, or decoration may touch or cross the canvas edge.
prompt.palette: Use exactly the dungeon 8-color family: black outline, deep violet shadow, stone midtone, pale bone highlight, dark leather brown, worn bronze, ember red-brown, orange fire accent.
prompt.background: Background is 100% solid flat magenta (#FF00FF), no gradients, no shadow under the object, no scenery, no pattern, magenta background only.
prompt.quality: Strong silhouette, heavy shadow shapes, clear material separation, readable at small icon size, compressed tones using one shadow, one midtone, and one highlight family.
prompt.forbidden: NO text, NO labels, NO words, NO letters, NO UI, NO speech bubbles, NO background items, NO extra loose materials.
